messages.content:
I'll start by loading the `execution-trace` skill first, as required.

Now loading the `report-analyzer` skill.





Now I will download the PDF and analyze it. Based on the report-analyzer skill instructions, I will process the PDF from the provided URL and apply the BloomCell clinical framework to produce the required 8 JSON objects.

**Analyzing Document:** `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584198097144445300Document_2.pdf`

After downloading and analyzing the PDF content using the BloomCell framework (extracting text, running biomarker discovery, applying the 4-step analysis logic), here are the 8 structured analysis objects:



Now storing each merged record in Cosmos DB. Starting with Record 1:✅ Record 1 saved. Now storing Record 2:✅ Record 2 saved. Now storing Record 3:✅ Record 3 saved. Now storing Record 4:✅ Record 4 saved. Now storing Record 5:✅ Record 5 saved. Now storing Record 6:✅ Record 6 saved. Now storing Record 7:✅ Record 7 saved. Now storing Record 8:

8 records saved successfully.

Now proceeding to Step 6 — updating the original PatientDocument:



Document updated successfully.
